# CWE-308 — Use of Single-factor Authentication (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-308-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: high-value wire transfer authorized by password alone.
func InitiateWire(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	if r.FormValue("password") == "" {
		http.Error(w, "password required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	amount := r.FormValue("amount")
	if amount == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing amount", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO wires (amount) VALUES (?)", amount)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
